context: The agent was given a Flux CD HelmRelease failure (ClusterRole ownership conflict) and asked to classify the layer, collect evidence, identify root cause, provide a fix, state blast radius, and give validation steps.

checklist.item: Classifies the failure as the chart rendering or reconciliation layer — NOT source or runtime
Lists at least 2 evidence commands: flux logs --kind=HelmRelease, kubectl get clusterrole, helm list -n cert-manager, or kubectl get events -n cert-manager
Correctly identifies root cause: pre-existing ClusterRole not owned by this HelmRelease causes ownership conflict
Fix includes helm uninstall cert-manager followed by flux reconcile helmrelease, or resource adoption via Helm metadata annotation
Blast radius notes that helm uninstall deletes cert-manager resources (certificates, CRDs) causing a brief certificate issuance lapse
Validation includes: flux get helmrelease shows Ready=True and kubectl get pods -n cert-manager shows all pods running
